description:
About the job

IMPORTANT: PLEASE READ THE ENTIRE JOB DESCRIPTION AND COMPLETE REQUIRED TASK AT THE END OR YOUR APPLICATION WILL NOT BE CONSIDERED!!




About Highstoke Media:

Highstoke Media is a dynamic digital marketing agency specializing in the luxury beauty and advanced aesthetics niche. Established in 2018, we are a fully remote, US-based company enjoying rapid growth. Our team of over 25 professionals spans globally. We value driven candidates who thrive in a flexible, fun remote work environment.




Job Purpose:

The Customer Success Manager / Account Manager will serve as the primary point of contact for our clients, ensuring their success by providing ongoing coaching, support, and guidance. This role is critical in maintaining strong client relationships, addressing challenges, and helping clients optimize the impact of our services. You will manage a book individual clients, ensuring they achieve their desired outcomes while effectively handling any client situations that arise.




What This Job Entails:

Managing and nurturing client relationships as the main point of contact, ensuring satisfaction and success throughout their journey.
Providing personalized coaching to help clients achieve their business goals, guiding them on best practices for maximizing the effectiveness of our services.
Addressing client challenges and urgent 'fires' with poise and problem-solving expertise.
Conducting regular check-ins with clients via Zoom to review progress and ensure alignment with their objectives.
Juggling multiple client accounts with ease, staying organized and responsive in a fast-paced environment.
Collaborating with internal teams to ensure seamless communication and support for clients.
Collecting and analyzing client feedback to continually improve the client experience.




Requirements:

Exceptional interpersonal, verbal, and written communication skills in English.
Experience in hosting and managing multiple Zoom meetings daily.
Strong technical acumen with the ability to troubleshoot and use software tools efficiently.
Proven ability to handle multiple client accounts and projects simultaneously while meeting deadlines.
Excellent problem-solving skills and ability to address client issues effectively, especially under pressure.
Ability to multi-task and stay organized in a dynamic, fast-paced environment.
2-3+ years in a customer-facing role, ideally in customer success or account management.
Experience with project management software such as Asana, Slack, and ClickUp.
Familiarity with digital marketing fundamentals is a plus.
Tech-savvy with a background in CRM systems and basic marketing software.
Background in the beauty/permanent makeup industry is advantageous.




Highly Recommended Experience:

2-3+ years in a similar customer success or account management role, ideally in marketing or advertising.
Experience with Facebook Ads, Google Ads, and other digital advertising platforms highly preferred
2-3+ years working in a USA-based company (for cultural and communication nuances).
Experience in a beauty-related industry




Benefits:

Fully remote position—work from anywhere in the world.
Competitive compensation, tailored based on experience.
Access to world-class training and education in advertising and marketing.
Part of a laid-back, yet professional startup environment.
Anticipated company growth beyond 200% in the coming year.
Flexible time off policy.




Job Type: Full-time (40+ Hours / Week)

Pay: $9.00-$15.00 USD / Hour (depending on experience)

Including:

Weekly incentives and commissions
Performance based bonuses & raises




Expectations:

This role is both demanding and rewarding, tailored for individuals who thrive in a dynamic, fast-paced environment. Our Customer Success Manager will have a full schedule, regularly meeting with clients to ensure their satisfaction and long-term success. We require someone who is exceptionally organized and excels in time management.




At Highstoke Media, we are not just offering a job; we are offering a career. If you're looking for an easy, clock-in/clock-out job, this will not be the right fit. We are looking for someone eager to grow with us long-term and be part of a groundbreaking movement in the luxury beauty and events industry. If you're committed to making a significant impact and advancing your career within a vibrant company, we would love to meet you.




Join Us:

If you are a driven individual who thrives in a fast-paced, client-facing role and is eager to make a significant impact, we would love to hear from you. Join us at Highstoke Media and be part of our success story.




--------------




EXTREMELY IMPORTANT LAST STEPS:

Step 1) Make sure you attach an English resume to this application.

Step 2) Please visit the link below and fill out the entire form which includes a small task. http://bit.ly/hsmclientsuccessjob




Note: Your application WILL NOT be considered if you do not complete this form.

description:
About the job

Caylent is a cloud native services company that helps organizations bring the best out of their people and technology using Amazon Web Services (AWS). We provide a full-range of AWS services including workload migrations and modernization, cloud native application development, DevOps, data engineering, security and compliance, and everything in between.

At Caylent, our people always come first. We are a global company and operate fully remote with employees in Canada, the United States, and Latin America. We celebrate the culture of each of our team members and foster a community of technological curiosity. Come talk to us to learn more about what it means to be a Caylien!

The Mission

We're seeking a talented Product Manager for our growing Professional Services team. The ideal candidate has substantial experience in product management within an application development and engineering services company. Your mission is to drive product success by designing customer-centric product roadmaps, interfacing with UI/UX teams, and managing the ongoing backlog of work that flows to engineering teams. Collaborating closely with our customers, you'll ensure they meet their goals, bridging the gap between business needs and technical execution.

Your Assignment

Support Customer/User Research and Journey Design

Work closely with customers to understand their needs, pain points, and goals. Conduct user research and facilitate journey design workshops to map out the customer journey. Use insights gathered to inform product decisions and ensure alignment with customer expectations.

Design Product Roadmaps

Create and maintain comprehensive product roadmaps that align with customer business goals and strategic priorities. Set clear product objectives and metrics, and ensure that roadmaps are regularly updated to reflect evolving customer needs and market trends.

Ongoing Product Management

Manage the product lifecycle from ideation to launch and beyond. Interface with UX teams to ensure that product designs meet user needs and provide a seamless experience. Collaborate with engineering teams to manage the backlog, prioritize features, and ensure timely delivery. Facilitate effective communication between UX and engineering teams to ensure alignment and address any roadblocks promptly.

KPIs:


Utilization
Influenced Pipeline and growth of Customers
CSAT scores within Product Engagements


Your Qualifications


5+ years of product management experience within application development and engineering services
Experience with product roadmap tools and software, running product experiments, and product launches
Experience with UX/UI concepts and technologies
Experience delivering large, complex consulting engagements for enterprise clients
Expertise in product lifecycle management and Agile methodologies
Excellent communication skills, especially with executive audiences
Startup environment adaptability and cross-functional teamwork
Curiosity and eagerness to learn new technologies
Willingness to travel for project kick-offs and key client milestones


Preferred Qualifications


Certifications in AWS, Agile, or related areas
Knowledge of Security Best Practices, Cloud Economics, Serverless technologies, container-based architecture, software development frameworks, and cloud cost optimization
Experience in AWS consulting with Fortune 2000 clients


Benefits


100% remote work
Medical Insurance for you and eligible dependents
Generous holidays and flexible PTO
Competitive phantom equity
Paid for exams and certifications
Peer bonus awards
State of the art laptop and tools
Equipment & Office Stipend
Individual professional development plan
Annual stipend for Learning and Development
Work with an amazing worldwide team and in an incredible corporate culture


This role may require up to 25% travel, depending on business needs.

NOTE: We’re unable to provide visa sponsorship now or at any time in the future.

At Caylent, we are committed to fair, transparent, and inclusive hiring practices. As part of our recruitment process, we may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools or automated systems to assist with the screening and evaluation of applications to help match candidate qualifications with job requirements.

These tools are designed to support — not replace — human decision-making. Final hiring decisions are always made by our trained recruitment professionals.

If an AI or automated tool is used during your application process, it will only be in accordance with applicable laws and regulations, and your information will be handled in a secure and confidential manner.

If you have any questions, please contact talent@caylent.com

Caylent is a place where everyone belongs. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees. Our approach helps us to build a winning team that represents a variety of backgrounds, perspectives, and abilities. So, regardless of how your diversity expresses itself, you can find a home here at Caylent.

We are proud to be an equal opportunity employer. We prohibit discrimination and harassment of any kind based on race, color, religion, national origin, sex (including pregnancy), sexual orientation, gender identity, gender expression, age, veteran status, genetic information, disability, or other applicable legally protected characteristics. If you would like to request an accommodation due to a disability, please contact us at hr@caylent.com.

ElevenCreative empowers creators and marketers to generate and edit speech, music, image, and video across 70+ languages.

description:
About the job

About ElevenLabs

ElevenLabs is an AI research and product company transforming how we interact with technology.

We launched in January 2023 with the first human-like AI voice model. Today, we serve millions of users and thousands of businesses - from fast-growing startups to large enterprises like Deutsche Telekom and Meta. Our investors are some of the world's most prominent, including Andreessen Horowitz, ICONIQ Growth and Sequoia. We've raised $781M in funding and our last valuation was $11B - multiples of 11, always.

We Have Expanded From Voice Into Three Main Platforms


ElevenAgents enables businesses to deliver seamless and intelligent customer experiences, with the integrations, testing, monitoring, and reliability necessary to deploy voice and chat agents at scale.
ElevenCreative empowers creators and marketers to generate and edit speech, music, image, and video across 70+ languages.
ElevenAPI gives developers access to our leading AI audio foundational models.


Everything we do is the result of the creativity and commitment of our team - builders doing the best work of their lives. We are researchers, engineers, and operators. IOI medalists and ex-founders. If you want to work hard and create lasting positive impact, we want to hear from you.

How we work


High-velocity: Rapid experimentation, lean autonomous teams, and minimal bureaucracy.
Impact not job titles: We don’t have job titles. Instead, it’s about the impact you have. No task is above or beneath you.
AI first: We use AI to move faster with higher-quality results. We do this across the whole company—from engineering to growth to operations.
Excellence everywhere: Everything we do should match the quality of our AI models.
Global team: We prioritize your talent, not your location.


What we offer


Innovative culture: You’ll be part of a generational opportunity to define the trajectory of AI, surrounded by a team pushing the boundaries of what’s possible.
Growth paths: Joining ElevenLabs means joining a dynamic team with countless opportunities to drive impact - beyond your immediate role and responsibilities.
Learning & development: ElevenLabs proactively supports professional development through an annual discretionary stipend.
Social travel: We also provide an annual discretionary stipend to meet up with colleagues each year, however you choose.
Annual company offsite: Each year, we bring the entire team together in a new location - past offsites have included Croatia and Italy.
Co-working: If you’re not located near one of our main hubs, we offer a monthly co-working stipend.


About The Role

As a Deployment Strategist, you'll work as part of a driven and creative team of Forward Deployed Engineers, Go to Market professionals, Product Engineers and other Strategists to deploy ElevenAgents, our enterprise AI platform, against the challenging problems our customers face. Your mission is to synthesize disconnected streams of thought into a cohesive understanding of what the most important problem is, what the existing workflows are, what the product needs, what users are motivated by, and where the impact could be.

No two days are the same, but as a Deployment Strategist you can expect to:


Meet with strategic customers to deeply understand their AI transformation goals and locate their biggest pain points, particularly around customer-facing and operational workflows powered by AI agents.
Own flagship deals end-to-end — from identifying the right use case to structuring commercial terms (including outcome-based pricing, license fees, and implementation arrangements) and driving them to close.
Embed yourself deeply inside strategic customers: act as a trusted partner with a provisioned account, spend meaningful time onsite, and own delivery outcomes as if you were part of their team.
Identify high-impact use cases through close engagement with customer problems and workflows, and collaborate with Forward Deployed Software Engineers to bring them to life.
Guide customers on best practices for deploying our products (e.g. ElevenAgents); including agent design, agent orchestration, production readiness to maximize adoption and impact.
Scope out potential applications in new industries and expand our AI solutions across different sectors globally.
Present the results of our work and proposals for future work to audiences ranging from technical teams to C-suite executives.
Collaborate with our Research teams to feed field insights back into ElevenLabs' platform and models, helping shape the roadmap.
Build and deliver compelling demos of ElevenAgents and our broader AI technology to new and existing customers.
Collaborate daily with customers' engineering and executive teams to ensure agents reach production and deliver measurable business outcomes.


Requirements


3+ years of experience working with customers in a technical capacity. Direct enterprise customer experience is preferred.
Experience in product development, delivery, and change management
Commercial instinct: comfort engaging in deal conversations, structuring value propositions, and navigating enterprise sales cycles alongside GTM partners.
Basic proficiency in Python and familiarity with API integration, sufficient to prototype, demo, and communicate credibly with engineering teams.
Excellent communication and problem-solving skills; particularly the ability to simplify complex technical concepts and structure clear logic in pursuit of optimal solutions.
A proven track record of taking ownership of complex, ambiguous projects and delivering results.
Adaptability to work across different customer environments, industries, and technical use cases.
Technical aptitude and familiarity with common LLM, tooling and AI agent frameworks.
Ability to creatively map enterprise use cases and workflows to AI systems


Location

This role is remote and can be executed globally. If you prefer, you can work from our offices in Bangalore, Dublin, London, New York, San Francisco, Tokyo, and Warsaw.

title: Email & Website Copywriter | DTC eCommerce
skills: Write email campaigns and lifecycle flows including Welcome Series, Abandoned Cart, Browse Abandonment, Post-Purchase, Win-Back, and VIP/Loyalty programs.
Develop subject lines, preview text, calls-to-action, and promotional messaging for email campaigns.
Write website copy for eCommerce storefronts, including homepages, product detail pages, collection pages, landing pages, and promotional site experiences.
Translate brand positioning, product benefits, and customer insights into clear, persuasive copy adapted to different audience segments and customer journey stages.
Research products, target audiences, competitors, and category trends to produce contextually relevant copy.
Collaborate with Designers, Strategists, and account team members to ensure cohesive campaign and website execution across digital touchpoints.
Revise and refine copy based on feedback from clients and internal stakeholders while managing multiple client projects and deadlines.
3+ years of professional copywriting experience, with demonstrated work in both email marketing and website/landing page copy for DTC eCommerce brands. English writing samples are a must.
Strong portfolio showcasing email marketing flows and eCommerce website copywriting.
Excellent written and spoken English with a strong command of U.S. consumer language, cultural nuance, and digital shopping behavior.
Proven ability to adapt copy across multiple brand voices, customer audiences, and product categories.
Understanding of email marketing best practices, customer lifecycle marketing, and eCommerce conversion-focused copy.
Familiarity with platforms such as Shopify, Klaviyo, or other eCommerce and email marketing tools.
Experience writing for A/B testing, personalization, or performance-driven copy optimization is a plus.
description:
About the job

Floowi connects top LATAM professionals with leading U.S. companies through remote talent solutions. Our mission is to make LATAM the world's premier hub for growth and excellence.




🌟 About our Client:

This is a full-service Shopify Plus agency and Klaviyo Master Elite partner that provides lifecycle marketing, website redesign, conversion rate optimization, and branding services to DTC eCommerce brands across categories including beauty, health & wellness, food & beverage, fashion, and home & lifestyle. The agency works with a growing portfolio of U.S.-based consumer brands, offering end-to-end digital commerce solutions from customer acquisition through retention.




✍ Short Description:




This role supports a portfolio of DTC eCommerce clients by producing high-quality copy across email and website channels. The Email & Website Copywriter is responsible for developing lifecycle email flows, campaign messaging, and website copy that aligns with each brand's voice, engages target audiences, and drives conversion. The role requires close collaboration with Strategists and Designers to ensure cohesive execution across owned digital channels, while managing multiple client accounts and deadlines simultaneously.




🌎 Location: 100% Remote (LATAM only)

🗣 Language Requirements: Advanced English (C1+)

⏰ Schedule: Full-time, aligned with EST

😀 Start Date: ASAP




💰 Compensation & Benefits:

Competitive salary in USD

Remote-first flexibility. Work from anywhere.

PTO and paid U.S. holidays




💼 Responsibilities:

Write email campaigns and lifecycle flows including Welcome Series, Abandoned Cart, Browse Abandonment, Post-Purchase, Win-Back, and VIP/Loyalty programs.
Develop subject lines, preview text, calls-to-action, and promotional messaging for email campaigns.
Write website copy for eCommerce storefronts, including homepages, product detail pages, collection pages, landing pages, and promotional site experiences.
Translate brand positioning, product benefits, and customer insights into clear, persuasive copy adapted to different audience segments and customer journey stages.
Research products, target audiences, competitors, and category trends to produce contextually relevant copy.
Collaborate with Designers, Strategists, and account team members to ensure cohesive campaign and website execution across digital touchpoints.
Revise and refine copy based on feedback from clients and internal stakeholders while managing multiple client projects and deadlines.




💡 Qualifications:

3+ years of professional copywriting experience, with demonstrated work in both email marketing and website/landing page copy for DTC eCommerce brands. English writing samples are a must.
Strong portfolio showcasing email marketing flows and eCommerce website copywriting.
Excellent written and spoken English with a strong command of U.S. consumer language, cultural nuance, and digital shopping behavior.
Proven ability to adapt copy across multiple brand voices, customer audiences, and product categories.
Understanding of email marketing best practices, customer lifecycle marketing, and eCommerce conversion-focused copy.
Familiarity with platforms such as Shopify, Klaviyo, or other eCommerce and email marketing tools.
Experience writing for A/B testing, personalization, or performance-driven copy optimization is a plus.




📩 If you meet the experience outlined above, we'd love to hear from you. Please apply — our team is excited about your application and will be in touch as soon as possible.

description:
About the job

Company Overview

Docusign brings agreements to life. Over 1.5 million customers and more than a billion people in over 180 countries use Docusign solutions to accelerate the process of doing business and simplify people’s lives. With intelligent agreement management, Docusign unleashes business-critical data that is trapped inside of documents. Until now, these were disconnected from business systems of record, costing businesses time, money, and opportunity. Using Docusign’s Intelligent Agreement Management platform, companies can create, commit, and manage agreements with solutions created by the #1 company in e-signature and contract lifecycle management (CLM).

What you'll do

As a Recruiting Coordinator, you will work closely with our Recruiters to support all administrative processes. Recruiting Coordinators are the backbone of the Talent Acquisition team, following the candidate process every step of the way. In this role, you will be responsible for ensuring a seamless interview process for each candidate you work with. You are the face of Docusign and represent our company’s image to prospective employees. You provide outstanding customer service and work professionally, efficiently, and meticulously. This position will provide support, knowledge, communication and partnership to the Talent Acquisition team with regards to interview scheduling and the entry and audit of key employment information into our Applicant Tracking System.

This is a fixed term contract role for 8 months of duration.

This position is an individual contributor role reporting to the Lead, Recruiting Coordination.

Responsibility


Schedule candidate interviews (phone, virtual and occasional onsite) by coordinating with recruiters, candidates, hiring managers, and interviewers
Act as the primary point-of-contact for candidates and interview teams regarding interview schedules, modifications, and logistical arrangements
Ensure a superior candidate experience for both internal and external talent engaging with the Talent Acquisition team
Maintain appropriate, timely tracking of candidates as they move through the recruiting process within the Applicant Tracking System (ATS) and ticketing system
Impart knowledge and training on operational processes and applications pertaining to the scheduling and processes of the TA team
Exhibit effective and adaptable communication skills, engaging with colleagues across all organizational levels and regions
Support recruiting events, including but not limited to, recruiting offsite events and batch day interviews
Provide other recruiting-related administrative tasks as required


Job Designation

Hybrid: Employee divides their time between in-office and remote work. Access to an office location is required. (Frequency: Minimum 2 days per week; may vary by team but will be weekly in-office expectation)

Positions at Docusign are assigned a job designation of either In Office, Hybrid or Remote and are specific to the role/job. Preferred job designations are not guaranteed when changing positions within Docusign. Docusign reserves the right to change a position's job designation depending on business needs and as permitted by local law.

What you bring

Basic


BA/BS degree
1+ years of professional work experience


Preferred


Customer focused with an ability to build relationships and deliver a stand-out candidate experience
Self-directed problem solver with a desire to contribute to the organisation’s reputation and success
Experience with Google Products (Gmail, Docs, and Sheets), navigating an Applicant Tracking System (ATS), exposure to ServiceNow
Meticulously attentive to detail
Exceptional communicator - professional, proactive and responsive


Life at Docusign

Working here

Docusign is committed to building trust and making the world more agreeable for our employees, customers and the communities in which we live and work. You can count on us to listen, be honest, and try our best to do what’s right, every day. At Docusign, everything is equal.

We each have a responsibility to ensure every team member has an equal opportunity to succeed, to be heard, to exchange ideas openly, to build lasting relationships, and to do the work of their life. Best of all, you will be able to feel deep pride in the work you do, because your contribution helps us make the world better than we found it. And for that, you’ll be loved by us, our customers, and the world in which we live.

Accommodation

Docusign is committed to providing reasonable accommodations for qualified individuals with disabilities in our job application procedures. If you need such an accommodation, or a religious accommodation, during the application process, please contact us at accommodations@docusign.com.

If you experience any issues, concerns, or technical difficulties during the application process please get in touch with our Talent organization at taops@docusign.com for assistance.

Applicant and Candidate Privacy Notice

title: Marketing Specialist
skills: Executes and participates in general marketing functions that are more routine in nature, require smaller spend budgets and requires minimal contact with clients. Requires oversight with developing approach for more complex marketing functions which include higher thresholds of spend levels.

Participates in collaboration with business development, customers, product management, sales and other business partners in support of client-customized, content-rich marketing collateral, such as proposals, corporate communication, and other marketing related information for marketing functions more routine in nature. Will make recommendations regarding marketing process. Supports the marketing approach within strategy and budget.
Supports the development of strategic marketing plans for existing lines and participates in the interpretation of plans into “big ideas” to extend the company’s brand vision.
Supports the strategic direction, growth, and vision of assigned strategic growth objectives for the segment and manages the execution of programs. Has minimal client contact.
Supports the development of multiple pieces of promotional and advertising materials, such as press releases, social and digital media published on-line via web sites, twitter, etc.

Based on assigned strategic growth initiatives, builds and maintains existing relationships with internal contacts, external communications consultants and/or agencies. Participates in meetings with internal and/or external clients to understand their ongoing strategies and how relationships can be strengthened within the client’s organization.
Supports the development of product promotion and launch strategies.

Beginning to act as a marketing advocate, communications consultant, and/or liaison for business support units and/or operational units within the organization. Supports communications with leaders in those units on specific communications issues and strategic growth initiatives and coordinates appropriate marketing resources to achieve their functional goals.

Recommends measurements for return on investment (ROI) for marketing projects within the specific goals of building and delivering campaigns, such as internal and external communications, product launches, new business units, acquisitions, and RFP/RFI proposals within planned scope, schedule, cost and quality, and trade shows/events. Tracks costs against measurements.
Bachelor's Degree
Relevant Experience or Degree in: Digital Marketing , Advertising ,
Typically Minimum 3 Years Relevant Exp
Prefer marketing service or marketing agency experience. Prefer sales force and email automation experience. Prefer payments industry experience.

Skills / Knowledge - Having wide-ranging experience, uses professional concepts and company objectives to resolve moderately complex issues in creative and effective ways. Having ownership of a sub-function, account or matrix management responsibilities, applies knowledge to meet goals, maintain relationships, propose opportunities to expand the business, and lead matrix teams. Some barriers to entry exist at this level (e.g., dept./peer review).

Job Complexity - Works on complex issues where analysis of situations or data requires an in-depth evaluation of variable factors. Exercises judgment in selecting methods, techniques and evaluation criteria for obtaining results. Networks with key contacts outside own area of expertise. Builds on/Maintains external relationships of assigned accounts.
Supervision - Determines methods and procedures on new assignments and may coordinate activities of other personnel (Team Lead).
Marketing production execution - Broad marketing services and/or print/production
Communication skills - Including communication with internal or external audiences
description:
About the job

Every day, Global Payments makes it possible for millions of people to move money between buyers and sellers using our payments solutions for credit, debit, prepaid and merchant services. Our worldwide team helps over 3 million companies, more than 1,300 financial institutions and over 600 million cardholders grow with confidence and achieve amazing results. We are driven by our passion for success and we are proud to deliver best-in-class payment technology and software solutions. Join our dynamic team and make your mark on the payments technology landscape of tomorrow.

Summary of This Role

Responsible for managing marketing, advertising and promotional activities for various products or channels. Takes steps to measure, enhance, and enrich the position and image of the company through various goals and objectives. Plan and execute day-to-day marketing activities in support of a product, service or channel. Help prepare and adhere to budgets. Oversee creation and delivery of advertising and marketing materials and ensure brand messages are consistent. Collaborate with sales and product to develop strategic partnership activities and implement the execution the identified opportunities.

What Part Will You Play?


Executes and participates in general marketing functions that are more routine in nature, require smaller spend budgets and requires minimal contact with clients. Requires oversight with developing approach for more complex marketing functions which include higher thresholds of spend levels.
Participates in collaboration with business development, customers, product management, sales and other business partners in support of client-customized, content-rich marketing collateral, such as proposals, corporate communication, and other marketing related information for marketing functions more routine in nature. Will make recommendations regarding marketing process. Supports the marketing approach within strategy and budget.
Supports the development of strategic marketing plans for existing lines and participates in the interpretation of plans into “big ideas” to extend the company’s brand vision.
Supports the strategic direction, growth, and vision of assigned strategic growth objectives for the segment and manages the execution of programs. Has minimal client contact.
Supports the development of multiple pieces of promotional and advertising materials, such as press releases, social and digital media published on-line via web sites, twitter, etc.
Based on assigned strategic growth initiatives, builds and maintains existing relationships with internal contacts, external communications consultants and/or agencies. Participates in meetings with internal and/or external clients to understand their ongoing strategies and how relationships can be strengthened within the client’s organization.
Supports the development of product promotion and launch strategies.
Beginning to act as a marketing advocate, communications consultant, and/or liaison for business support units and/or operational units within the organization. Supports communications with leaders in those units on specific communications issues and strategic growth initiatives and coordinates appropriate marketing resources to achieve their functional goals.
Recommends measurements for return on investment (ROI) for marketing projects within the specific goals of building and delivering campaigns, such as internal and external communications, product launches, new business units, acquisitions, and RFP/RFI proposals within planned scope, schedule, cost and quality, and trade shows/events. Tracks costs against measurements.


What Are We Looking For in This Role?

Minimum Qualifications


Bachelor's Degree
Relevant Experience or Degree in: Digital Marketing , Advertising ,
Typically Minimum 3 Years Relevant Exp


Preferred Qualifications


Prefer marketing service or marketing agency experience. Prefer sales force and email automation experience. Prefer payments industry experience.


What Are Our Desired Skills and Capabilities?


Skills / Knowledge - Having wide-ranging experience, uses professional concepts and company objectives to resolve moderately complex issues in creative and effective ways. Having ownership of a sub-function, account or matrix management responsibilities, applies knowledge to meet goals, maintain relationships, propose opportunities to expand the business, and lead matrix teams. Some barriers to entry exist at this level (e.g., dept./peer review).
Job Complexity - Works on complex issues where analysis of situations or data requires an in-depth evaluation of variable factors. Exercises judgment in selecting methods, techniques and evaluation criteria for obtaining results. Networks with key contacts outside own area of expertise. Builds on/Maintains external relationships of assigned accounts.

title: IT Power BI Support Engineer Coordinator
skills: Power BI Support & Troubleshooting:
Provide expert-level support for Power BI reports, dashboards, and datasets, diagnosing and resolving complex issues related to data connectivity, data refresh, report performance, and data accuracy.
Investigate root causes of issues within Power BI components, often requiring analysis of underlying data sources and data models.
Collaborate with end-users, product teams, and business stakeholders to understand and address their Power BI-related challenges and requirements.
Performance Analysis & Optimization:
Monitor the performance of Power BI reports and dashboards, identifying bottlenecks and areas for improvement.
Analyze Power BI data models, DAX queries, and M-query logic to recommend and implement optimizations for faster report loading and improved user experience.
Propose and implement solutions for efficient data refresh processes and scalable data models within Power BI.
Collaboration & Stakeholder Management:
Act as a key liaison between business users, product teams, and our managed service provider for all Power BI-related support activities.
Work closely with the managed service provider to ensure timely resolution of incidents, effective change management, and adherence to service level agreements (SLAs).
Translate complex technical issues and solutions into clear, understandable language for non-technical stakeholders.
Data Analysis & SQL Proficiency:
Utilize strong SQL skills to query and analyze underlying data sources (e.g., data warehouses, data lakes) to validate data in Power BI, troubleshoot discrepancies, and understand data structures.
Assist in data quality checks and verification processes to ensure the integrity of data presented in Power BI.
Documentation & Best Practices:
Create and maintain comprehensive documentation for Power BI reports, datasets, data models, and troubleshooting procedures.
Contribute to the development and enforcement of Power BI best practices, governance standards, and reporting guidelines across the organization.
Stay updated with the latest Power BI features and updates, evaluating their potential impact and benefits.

description:
About the job

L'Oréal has devoted itself to beauty for over 100 years. With its unique international portfolio of 36 diverse and complementary brands, L’Oreal is the world’s leading beauty company. L'Oréal is present across all distribution networks: mass market, department stores, pharmacies and drugstores, hair salons, travel retail, branded retail, and e-commerce. Research and Innovation, and a dedicated research team of 4,000 scientists, are at the core of L'Oréal’s strategy, working to meet beauty aspirations all over the world. L'Oréal's sustainability commitment, "L'Oréal for the Future," sets ambitious sustainable development objectives across the Group’s value chain.

Mexico Tech Hub – Data Run Excellence Team Our Mexico Tech Hub plays a crucial role in L'Oréal's global technology landscape, driving innovation and providing essential support across various domains. Within this hub, our team is dedicated to ensuring the seamless operation and optimal performance of critical data and analytical platforms. This specific role will be part of the team overseeing the support of Power BI components integral to the Americas Beauty Tech Data Platform. We are committed to providing reliable, efficient, and user-centric support, fostering a collaborative environment, and continuously striving for excellence in data visualization and reporting.

The Role: L'Oréal is seeking a highly experienced and technically proficient Power BI Specialist to join our team at the Mexico Tech Hub. In this vital role, you will be responsible for the end-to-end support, maintenance, and optimization of Power BI reports, dashboards, and datasets that are part of the Americas BTDP data products. Leveraging your extensive Power BI expertise, you will collaborate closely with various stakeholders to troubleshoot issues, analyze performance, and recommend enhancements to ensure our business users have access to accurate, timely, and insightful data visualizations. This role requires a deep understanding of Power BI's capabilities, strong SQL skills, and a proactive approach to problem-solving and collaboration.

Translate complex technical issues and solutions into clear, understandable language for non-technical stakeholders.
Data Analysis & SQL Proficiency:
Utilize strong SQL skills to query and analyze underlying data sources (e.g., data warehouses, data lakes) to validate data in Power BI, troubleshoot discrepancies, and understand data structures.
Assist in data quality checks and verification processes to ensure the integrity of data presented in Power BI.
Documentation & Best Practices:

Extensive hands-on expertise with Microsoft Power BI Desktop, Power BI Service, Power BI Gateway, and Power BI Premium capabilities.

title: Renewal Consultant
skills: Gestionar el ciclo completo de renovaciones de contratos, asegurando una transición sin fricciones para los clientes.

Identificar riesgos de churn proactivamente y desarrollar estrategias para retener clientes al momento de renegociar. Monitorear indicadores clave de retención y satisfacción del cliente para anticipar riesgos de churn y tomar acciones preventivas.
Definir estrategias de negociación según el perfil y potencial del cliente, asegurando una propuesta de valor atractiva.
Recoger y analizar razones de no renovación o resistencia a la renovación, compartiendo estos insights con equipos internos para mejorar la propuesta de valor
Coordinar con Customer Happiness y Upselling para identificar oportunidades de expansión.
Mantener actualizados los sistemas CRM (Hubspot) y herramientas de gestión de contratos.

Cultura de Innovación: En Buk, valoramos la creatividad y la proactividad. Trabajarás en un entorno que te brinda la libertad para proponer nuevas ideas y estrategias que impacten directamente en nuestra misión.

Desarrollo profesional: Trabajarás junto a un equipo de talento excepcional que te permitirá potenciar tus habilidades y crecer profesionalmente. Además,contarás con una plan de carrera para que puedas alcanzar tu potencial y crecer dentro de Buk.
Potenciamos tu aprendizaje: ¡Te ofrecemos más de 400 cursos a través de nuestra plataforma Bukplay para que puedas aprender y capacitarte en lo que tú quieras!

Programa 'Buk Culture Internship' y 'Exchange': Postula y participa de intercambios culturales en los países donde operamos. ¡Vive la experiencia de conocer a otros bukers y conviértete en embajador de nuestra cultura!
Flexibilidad con Responsabilidad: Sabemos que el equilibrio es clave. Tendrás la flexibilidad de trabajar desde donde te sientas más cómodo, siempre con la responsabilidad de alcanzar los objetivos.

Beneficios Revolucionarios: Desde “no política de vacaciones”, stock options y 5 semanas de post natal parental, hasta un plan de beneficios con puntos totalmente personalizado, ¡Te ofrecemos todo lo que necesitas para prosperar tanto personal como profesionalmente.
Experiencia de al menos 2 años en venta o renovación de contratos.
Experiencia en interacción, negociación y manejo de clientes.
Manejo de HubSpot
Excel intermedio
description:
About the job

¡Únete a Buk como nuestro próxim@ Renewal Consultant!




En Buk, estamos buscando una persona apasionada por lo que hace, con growth mindset, que piense “fuera de la caja” y quiera ir más allá. Alguien que no le tema a los desafíos, que trabaje de manera ágil, superando los obstáculos y aprendiendo de los errores. Buscamos una persona que valore nuestra cultura de excelencia, donde la exigencia y el trabajo colaborativo se unen para impactar en el cliente y crear lugares de trabajo más felices.




Nos motiva trabajar con personas admirables y que te desafían a diario a entregar lo mejor de ti. Nos esforzamos constantemente por superar nuestros propios estándares y entregar resultados de alta calidad. Evaluamos meticulosamente la productividad, el desempeño y el impacto de nuestras acciones utilizando métricas claras y objetivas. ¿Te identificas con todo esto?




¿Qué te espera?

Gestionar el ciclo completo de renovaciones de contratos, asegurando una transición sin fricciones para los clientes.
Identificar riesgos de churn proactivamente y desarrollar estrategias para retener clientes al momento de renegociar. Monitorear indicadores clave de retención y satisfacción del cliente para anticipar riesgos de churn y tomar acciones preventivas.
Definir estrategias de negociación según el perfil y potencial del cliente, asegurando una propuesta de valor atractiva.
Recoger y analizar razones de no renovación o resistencia a la renovación, compartiendo estos insights con equipos internos para mejorar la propuesta de valor
Coordinar con Customer Happiness y Upselling para identificar oportunidades de expansión.
Mantener actualizados los sistemas CRM (Hubspot) y herramientas de gestión de contratos.




¿Qué ofrecemos?

Cultura de Innovación: En Buk, valoramos la creatividad y la proactividad. Trabajarás en un entorno que te brinda la libertad para proponer nuevas ideas y estrategias que impacten directamente en nuestra misión.
Desarrollo profesional: Trabajarás junto a un equipo de talento excepcional que te permitirá potenciar tus habilidades y crecer profesionalmente. Además,contarás con una plan de carrera para que puedas alcanzar tu potencial y crecer dentro de Buk.
Potenciamos tu aprendizaje: ¡Te ofrecemos más de 400 cursos a través de nuestra plataforma Bukplay para que puedas aprender y capacitarte en lo que tú quieras!
Programa 'Buk Culture Internship' y 'Exchange': Postula y participa de intercambios culturales en los países donde operamos. ¡Vive la experiencia de conocer a otros bukers y conviértete en embajador de nuestra cultura!
Flexibilidad con Responsabilidad: Sabemos que el equilibrio es clave. Tendrás la flexibilidad de trabajar desde donde te sientas más cómodo, siempre con la responsabilidad de alcanzar los objetivos.
Beneficios Revolucionarios: Desde “no política de vacaciones”, stock options y 5 semanas de post natal parental, hasta un plan de beneficios con puntos totalmente personalizado, ¡Te ofrecemos todo lo que necesitas para prosperar tanto personal como profesionalmente.




Un poco más sobre nosotros:

Hace 8 años comenzamos con un equipo de menos de 10 personas y hoy ya somos más de 1.700 bukers trabajando día a día para tener el Software de Gestión de Personas más completo del mercado. Esto, gracias a que hemos mantenido nuestro espíritu innovador y nuestra pasión por la tecnología y la excelencia. Además, nos encontramos presentes en Chile, Colombia, Perú, México y Brasil.




Te compartimos un video para que puedas ver cómo vivimos el día a día en Buk: https://www.buk.mx/quienes-somos







¿Qué buscamos?




Experiencia de al menos 2 años en venta o renovación de contratos.
Experiencia en interacción, negociación y manejo de clientes.

Excel intermedio

description:
About the job

Company Description Púrpura AI helps organizations move from artificial intelligence strategy to concrete action in weeks, not years. The company works with businesses that recognize the need for AI but are unsure how to begin, guiding them through a clear, practical path to implementation. With a focus on turning ideas into measurable results, Púrpura AI supports clients in identifying opportunities, designing solutions, and driving adoption. Team members collaborate closely with clients to make AI accessible, understandable, and impactful across different industries.
Role Description This is a full-time hybrid role for a Junior AI Strategy Consultant based in Mexico City, Mexico, with flexibility for partial work from home. The Junior AI Strategy Consultant will support senior consultants in analyzing client needs, mapping business processes, and identifying potential AI use cases. Typical day-to-day tasks include gathering and organizing client requirements, preparing presentations and documentation, and assisting in the development of AI strategy roadmaps. The role involves conducting market and technology research, contributing to workshops and client meetings, and coordinating with technical teams to ensure alignment between strategy and implementation. The consultant will also help monitor project progress, document findings, and contribute to internal knowledge sharing and continuous improvement.
Qualifications
 
Foundational understanding of AI concepts, data-driven decision making, and technology trends relevant to business strategy.
Strong analytical and research abilities, including the capacity to interpret data, synthesize information, and present clear insights.
Good communication and presentation skills, with the ability to create structured documents, slides, and reports for non-technical audiences.
Ability to collaborate in cross-functional teams, manage time effectively, and handle multiple tasks in a consulting or project-based environment.
Interest in working directly with clients, including participation in workshops, interviews, and requirements-gathering sessions.
Proficiency in English and Spanish, both written and spoken, to work with diverse stakeholders.
Bachelor’s degree (completed or in progress) in Business, Engineering, Computer Science, Economics, or a related field, or equivalent practical experience.
Experience or coursework in AI, data analytics, management consulting, or digital transformation is a plus.

description:
About the job

About WPP Media

WPP is the trusted growth partner for the world’s leading brands. With exceptional talent, trusted data and intelligence, and world-class partnerships – all united by our pioneering agentic marketing platform, WPP Open – we help clients navigate change, capture opportunity, and deliver transformational growth. 

WPP Media is WPP's AI-driven media operating unit, bringing together media, data, and partnerships to deliver creative personalisation at scale. Connected through WPP Open and powered by Open Intelligence, clients see exactly where, how, and why their media investment is working.

For more information, visit wppmedia.com.

*Executive, GOC*

About WPP Media

WPP is the creative transformation company. We use the power of creativity to build better futures for our people, planet, clients and communities. For more information, visit wpp.com.

WPP Media is WPP’s global media collective. In a world where media is everywhere and in everything, we bring the best platform, people, and partners together to create limitless opportunities for growth. For more information, visit wppmedia.com

At WPP Media, we believe in the power of our culture and our people. It’s what elevates us to deliver exceptional experiences for both our clients and each other. In this role it will be critical to embrace WPP & WPP Media’s shared core values:


 Be Extraordinary by Leading Collectively to Inspire transformational Creativity.
 Create an Open environment by Balancing People and Client Experiences by Cultivating Trust.
 Lead Optimistically by Championing Growth and Development to Mobilize the Enterprise.


*Role Summary and Impact*

As part of the Global Operations Centre (GOC), you will work closely with teams across the United States, Europe, and Asia to deliver high-impact solutions in a collaborative, multicultural environment. We are looking for an Executive who will:


 Interact effectively with regional teams and be a strong communicator.
 Support digital media campaign launches and setup according to established processes.
 Monitor and report on digital media campaign checks across channels/platforms.
 Ensure data accuracy for campaign reporting tools and WPP Media campaign management software.
 Produce daily campaign reports, including daily pacing, data inputting and providing commentary to regional teams.


*Skills and Experience*

If this opportunity looks right for you, we are looking for candidates who have:


 Bachelor’s degree.
 Advanced English level (B2–C2).
 Strong analytical and numerical skills.
 Excellent communication, both written and verbal.
 Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and Google Sheets.


Please read our Privacy Notice for more information on how we process the information you provide.

Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Communications, or a related field.
At least 1 year of hands-on experience managing email campaigns.
Familiarity with email marketing platforms (such as Klaviyo, Mailchimp, or similar).
Strong writing and editing skills with a knack for creating engaging content.
Detail-oriented, analytical, and proactive with a creative mindset.


Technical Requirements


Reliable internet connection with a minimum of 25 Mbps for both upload and download speed.
Personal PC or laptop with a minimum i5 processor.


Perks Of Working With Us


Fully remote work environment.
Paid time off to recharge and relax.
Health and dental coverage.
Opportunities for growth and recognition.
Holiday bonuses and other exciting incentives.


If you're passionate about digital marketing, eager to make an impact, and excited to be part of a collaborative and creative team — we’d love to hear from you!

This role is directly with TalentPop App. Come grow with us!

title: IT Integration Team Lead
skills: Team lead role managing technical team for project delivery. Architecture design Integration flow and oversee all project development status and drive team to reach delivery excellence
Perform technical team lead duties through design, build and maintain integration solutions using REST APIs, ESB, IPaaS, EDA/Microservices, and cloud technologies.

Define and enforce integration standards, coding practices, and technical documentation across the integration landscape.

Building relationships with clients and in practice development activities
Acting as key point of contact and work cross functionally with all product delivery leads on providing solution architecture decisions.

Degree (Bachelor or Masters) in Computer Science, Computer Engineering, or Electrical Engineering or equivalent experience
8+ years of proven experience as a Software Development Lead, Integration Architect and/or as Software developer
Outstanding functional and technical communication skills and demonstrated business and IT collaboration.

Proficient in relational data modeling concepts and implementations.
Innovator with quick absorption of new technologies; strong understanding of technology solutions.
Strong interpersonal skills with ability to work as a member of cross functional teams.
Excellent written and verbal communication skills
description:
About the job

For more than a century, L’Oréal has devoted its energy, innovation, and scientific excellence solely to one business: Beauty. Our goal is to offer every person around the world the best of beauty in terms of quality, efficacy, safety, sincerity and responsibility to satisfy all beauty needs and desires in their infinite diversity. At L'Oréal, our IT teams design and build solutions to ensure high performance for all our business sectors by imagining new ways of doing things, from designing websites to building algorithms and predicting new trends. They can be found leading teams towards a more connected and digitalized future in IT retail, e-commerce, CRM, data, AI, cybersecurity, Cloud and E-Marketing. You never stop learning at L'Oréal IT because things change at the speed of light! Come join our dynamic team!

To stimulate our Beauty Tech transformation, we have created the Tech Factory team, a product delivery organization (startup inside the big ship) to deliver transversal use cases that will drive the tech transformation of the group, covering all business and functional domains under a network of international hubs.

Main Responsibilities


 Team lead role managing technical team for project delivery. Architecture design Integration flow and oversee all project development status and drive team to reach delivery excellence
 Perform technical team lead duties through design, build and maintain integration solutions using REST APIs, ESB, IPaaS, EDA/Microservices, and cloud technologies.
 Responsible for defining new architectures and ability to drive an independent project from an architectural standpoint.
 Partner with stakeholders to translate business requirements into technical specifications, including Blueprint documentation. Create and maintain specifications, documents, test plans and scripts.
 Architect and develop prototypes and demonstrate various alternatives for functional business requirements for a wide audience range.
 Resolve defects discovered during all phases of development and maintenance including severity 1 production issues.
 Define and enforce integration standards, coding practices, and technical documentation across the integration landscape.
 Mentor junior developers and promote best practices in integration development, testing, deployment, and support.
 Building relationships with clients and in practice development activities
 Acting as key point of contact and work cross functionally with all product delivery leads on providing solution architecture decisions.
 Partnering with Enterprise architecture, Security and global teams through an alliance relationship and owning the technology solution topics around integration topics


Skills Required


Degree (Bachelor or Masters) in Computer Science, Computer Engineering, or Electrical Engineering or equivalent experience
8+ years of proven experience as a Software Development Lead, Integration Architect and/or as Software developer
Outstanding functional and technical communication skills and demonstrated business and IT collaboration.
Hands on/working knowledge of most environments described below is required:
 In-depth and hands-on knowledge of APIGEE, Workato, API Gateway, ESB, EMS, TIBCO BW, MFT, ETL, Confluent Kafka
 Tibco Business Works 6.x, Enterprise Message Service (EMS)

 Knowledge of Container orchestration technologies (Kubernetes/Docker) is a plus.
 Knowledge of Microservices and/or JAVA/Python is a plus.
 5+ years in technical team manaement and people management experience 
Industry knowledge/experience within Supply Chain, Sales, e-commerce, loyalty, CRM, retail, mobile apps
Demonstrated ability to manage projects and strong ability to influence others.
Agile/Product experience is a plus.
API gateway/ESB certification preferred
Proficient in relational data modeling concepts and implementations.
Innovator with quick absorption of new technologies; strong understanding of technology solutions.

Excellent written and verbal communication skills


Are you ready for your next challenge? Want to join a passionate and dynamic team at the forefront of Beauty Tech? Looking for the chance to grow and develop inside a leading world organization? This is a fantastic opportunity to build the products that will shape the future of beauty at the L’Oréal Group.

Don’t meet every single requirement? At L'Oréal, we are dedicated to building a diverse, inclusive, and innovative workplace. If you’re excited about this role but your past experience doesn’t align perfectly with the qualifications listed in the job description, we encourage you to apply anyways! You may just be the right candidate for this or other roles!

We are an Equal Opportunity Employer and take pride in a diverse environment. We would love to find out more about you as a candidate and do not discriminate in recruitment, hiring, training, promotion, or other employment practices for reasons of race, color, religion, gender, sexual orientation, national origin, age, marital or veteran status, medical condition or disability, or any other legally protected status.

title: Content Strategist
skills: Planificación y adaptación de pautas: Planificar, desarrollar y adaptar las pautas de creación de contenido, asegurando que los textos se alineen con el tono y la voz de la marca. Esto incluye la redacción y actualización de guías y manuales de estilo, así como el diseño de herramientas y recursos que faciliten el proceso de redacción.
Redacción centrada en el usuario: Crear contenidos que prioricen las necesidades del usuario final.

Investigación y validación con usuarios: Realizar investigaciones con usuarios para generar y evaluar contenido de manera iterativa, asegurando que cada pieza responda a necesidades reales y mejore la experiencia del usuario.
Estructura y narrativa: Utilizar principios de arquitectura de la información y técnicas de storytelling para definir la estructura y flujo de los textos, mejorando su claridad y relevancia.

Argumentación y justificación de decisiones: Presentar y defender las decisiones de redacción ante diferentes áreas, utilizando datos y conocimiento de mejores prácticas para fundamentar las estrategias de contenido.

Redacción integrada en el diseño visual: Crear contenidos de enfoque comercial que se integren armónicamente en el diseño visual de interfaces, garantizando consistencia y atractivo en la presentación.

Homologación de la comunicación: Proponer y establecer lineamientos que permitan homologar la comunicación en los diversos canales digitales, reforzando la identidad verbal de la marca en toda la experiencia digital.

Análisis de audiencias y estrategia de contenido: Analizar a las audiencias objetivo para desarrollar estrategias de contenido específicas para diferentes flujos en aplicaciones e interfaces digitales, adaptando la comunicación a las particularidades de cada perfil de usuario.

Estrategia de contenidos: Experiencia en planificar y organizar la creación y publicación de contenido que sea relevante y adecuado para distintas audiencias y canales. Capacidad para homologar la comunicación a nivel ecosistema, garantizando consistencia en todos los contextos de interacción.

Comunicación escrita (ortografía y redacción): Dominio de las reglas ortográficas y gramaticales para redactar textos claros, precisos y coherentes. Conocimiento de técnicas de escritura creativa y copywriting, y experiencia generando iniciativas para mejorar la comunicación escrita, incluyendo la creación de lineamientos, guías y manuales internos.

Narrativa / Storytelling: Conocimiento de estructuras narrativas aplicables a diferentes tipos de comunicación. Habilidad para encontrar maneras innovadoras de contar historias que hagan al usuario protagonista, sin perder de vista la claridad, transparencia y responsabilidad en el mensaje.

Behavioral economics aplicada al UX Writing: Conocimiento en heurísticas, sesgos y modelos de comportamiento humano para integrarlos estratégicamente en las propuestas de contenido y soluciones, favoreciendo una experiencia de usuario más efectiva y relevante.

Técnicas de evaluación de contenido: Conocimiento y dominio de técnicas de evaluación de contenido, con la habilidad de identificar cuál técnica es adecuada según el objetivo de la investigación, para mejorar continuamente la efectividad y adecuación del contenido.
Beneficios de ley y superiores.
Días de vacaciones adicionales.
Beneficios de salud.
Trabajo bajo objetivos y flexibilidad de horario.
Aprendizaje continuo: acceso gratuito a cursos.
¡Muchos más!
description:
About the job

Description

¡Multiplica te está buscando!

Somos una consultora especializada en ofrecer las mejores oportunidades laborales al mejor talento digital del mercado.

Tenemos 26 años de experiencia reclutando a personas capacitadas, innovadoras y con ganas de crecer para nuestros clientes.

Actualmente colaboramos con empresas en LATAM, USA y Europa y contamos con talentos que trabajan presencialmente y/o remoto en diferentes partes del mundo.

Nuestros talentos son los agentes de cambio que están creando las organizaciones del futuro. ¡Sé parte de este cambio!

Misión del rol

Como Content Strategist, buscarás garantizar una comunicación clara, consistente y alineada con la identidad verbal de la marca en todos los puntos de interacción con la persona usuaria. Te enfocarás en crear y mantener una estrategia de contenido efectiva y cohesionada que refleje la voz del producto digital, colaborando estrechamente con stakeholders, equipos de diseño y otras áreas clave de la organización. Aplicarás las mejores prácticas en redacción y evaluarás continuamente nuestros estándares, asegurando que las soluciones de comunicación sean concisas, útiles y técnicamente viables para integrar una experiencia de usuario óptima.

Esta vacante es para desempeñarse bajo el modelo de Talent Implant en BBVA, formando parte del equipo de Multiplica.

Nota importante: Como requisito indispensable para postular, el candidato no deberá contar con un proceso de selección activo o reciente con BBVA a través de otra consultora.

Requirements

Conocimiento de técnicas de escritura creativa y copywriting, y experiencia generando iniciativas para mejorar la comunicación escrita, incluyendo la creación de lineamientos, guías y manuales internos.
 Narrativa / Storytelling: Conocimiento de estructuras narrativas aplicables a diferentes tipos de comunicación. Habilidad para encontrar maneras innovadoras de contar historias que hagan al usuario protagonista, sin perder de vista la claridad, transparencia y responsabilidad en el mensaje.
 Behavioral economics aplicada al UX Writing: Conocimiento en heurísticas, sesgos y modelos de comportamiento humano para integrarlos estratégicamente en las propuestas de contenido y soluciones, favoreciendo una experiencia de usuario más efectiva y relevante.

Benefits


Beneficios de ley y superiores.
Días de vacaciones adicionales.

title: 🤓 Content Funnel Marketing Manager | 100% Remote
skills: Has built a content strategy from scratch inside a coaching, info-product, or consulting business and knows exactly what it takes to make it achieve stellar results
Wants to be the content strategist, the writer, and the executor with an eye for performance, details and conversions
Sets a high bar for their own output and drives toward results without needing direction, deadlines set by others, or external pressure
🌎 Join a global team!
🤖 We leverage automation and smart systems to deliver accuracy, efficiency, and scalability.
🌴 We prioritize respect, collaboration, and work-life balance — sustainable excellence beats burnout every time.
🦾 We trust our people to lead with ownership and care.
Own the full content operation: ideation, scripting, production, distribution, and analytics across short-form video, long-form posts, email sequences, and webinar content
Develop and maintain a clear point of view on the avatar and the message without a brief required. You know who we are talking to, what moves them, and how to reach them
Build a content system that runs consistently, not just when there is bandwidth. That means frameworks, a repeatable production rhythm
Own the content side of the growth funnel end to end, including awareness, lead generation, nurture, and conversion sequences tied to webinars, lead magnets, and high-ticket offers
Identify what is working and what is not, make a call, and change it. You do not wait to be told, you bring a recommendation with the reasoning behind it
Design and iterate on distribution strategies across the platforms where the avatar lives: LinkedIn, YouTube, Instagram, X, and email
Track performance across content and funnel stages. Know your numbers, know what they mean, and use them to drive the next decision
Run your own analysis. Identify patterns, diagnose drop-off points, and build a feedback loop between what you publish and what you change

Operate inside an automation infrastructure that is actively being built. You will not build the technical layer, but you will feed it, shape what gets automated, and document your frameworks so they scale

5+ years in a content marketing or growth marketing role, with a meaningful portion of that time owning the function independently inside a coaching brand, info-product business, course business, or high-ticket service
Demonstrated ability to build and run a content funnel without day-to-day direction. You have owned strategy, execution, and iteration
A portfolio that shows content you have written, published, and tracked. Scripts, email sequences, posts, and webinar copy all count
Hands-on experience with tools from the coaching and info-product world such as GoHighLevel, ClickFunnels, Skool, webinar platforms, or similar
1️⃣ Apply Directly
2️⃣ Discovery Call with The People Team
3️⃣ Scenario-Based Assessment + Technical Review
4️⃣ Final Interview
5️⃣ Offer: If it’s a mutual fit, we move quickly — we want great leaders onboarded, not waiting.
description:
About the job

This role is for someone who:

Has built a content strategy from scratch inside a coaching, info-product, or consulting business and knows exactly what it takes to make it achieve stellar results
Wants to be the content strategist, the writer, and the executor with an eye for performance, details and conversions
Sets a high bar for their own output and drives toward results without needing direction, deadlines set by others, or external pressure




You’ll be responsible for crafting and running the content engine behind two growth funnels: UpCounting’s client acquisition and the personal brand of co-founder Abir. This role sits at the intersection of content strategy and hands-on execution and directly impacts how we reach and convert the right clients.




💰 The salary range for this role is CA$ 4k - 8k, depending on location and experience.




About UpCounting

We’re a fully remote, tech-powered firm helping eCommerce and digital-first businesses scale with confidence.




🌎 Join a global team!
🤖 We leverage automation and smart systems to deliver accuracy, efficiency, and scalability.
🌴 We prioritize respect, collaboration, and work-life balance — sustainable excellence beats burnout every time.
🦾 We trust our people to lead with ownership and care.




What You’ll Be Doing

You’ll be responsible for the following core areas:




📝 Content Ownership

Own the full content operation: ideation, scripting, production, distribution, and analytics across short-form video, long-form posts, email sequences, and webinar content
Develop and maintain a clear point of view on the avatar and the message without a brief required. You know who we are talking to, what moves them, and how to reach them
Build a content system that runs consistently, not just when there is bandwidth. That means frameworks, a repeatable production rhythm




🎯 Funnel Ownership and Optimization

Own the content side of the growth funnel end to end, including awareness, lead generation, nurture, and conversion sequences tied to webinars, lead magnets, and high-ticket offers
Identify what is working and what is not, make a call, and change it. You do not wait to be told, you bring a recommendation with the reasoning behind it
Design and iterate on distribution strategies across the platforms where the avatar lives: LinkedIn, YouTube, Instagram, X, and email




📊 Performance and Iteration

Track performance across content and funnel stages. Know your numbers, know what they mean, and use them to drive the next decision
Run your own analysis. Identify patterns, diagnose drop-off points, and build a feedback loop between what you publish and what you change
Operate inside an automation infrastructure that is actively being built. You will not build the technical layer, but you will feed it, shape what gets automated, and document your frameworks so they scale

 

Required

5+ years in a content marketing or growth marketing role, with a meaningful portion of that time owning the function independently inside a coaching brand, info-product business, course business, or high-ticket service
Demonstrated ability to build and run a content funnel without day-to-day direction. You have owned strategy, execution, and iteration
A portfolio that shows content you have written, published, and tracked. Scripts, email sequences, posts, and webinar copy all count
Hands-on experience with tools from the coaching and info-product world such as GoHighLevel, ClickFunnels, Skool, webinar platforms, or similar




Perks & Culture

Because great work deserves a great place to do it.




🌍 Work from anywhere

We care about outcomes, not location




🌴 Paid time off

PTO, Me Days, regional Stat Holidays, and year-end office closure




📈 Grow with us

Promotion based on performance, leadership, reliability, and impact

 

Your Journey at UpCounting




Your First Week

You will review existing content, understand the funnel infrastructure, and meet the people building it. Your goal in the first week is to understand the avatar deeply and start identifying where you can add leverage fast.




After 1 Month

You are producing content consistently, without needing review on every piece. You have a working understanding of the funnel and where content fits into each stage. You have shipped enough to know what is resonating.




In 3 Months

You own the function end-to-end. You are running your own analysis, iterating on what works, and making decisions without being asked. The funnel is moving, you know exactly why, and you are already thinking about what comes next.




Curious About Our Values & Culture?

They’re built around excellence, autonomy, respect, and curiosity.

💙 Learn more on our Careers Page.




How We Hire

Our process is transparent, efficient, and respectful of your time:

1️⃣ Apply Directly
2️⃣ Discovery Call with The People Team
3️⃣ Scenario-Based Assessment + Technical Review
4️⃣ Final Interview
5️⃣ Offer: If it’s a mutual fit, we move quickly — we want great leaders onboarded, not waiting.




💙 No cover letter needed. Just tell us what drew you to UpCounting.

Every application is reviewed by our People team — we don’t use AI to screen or assess candidates. Thoughtful hiring matters to us.

description:
About the job

Customer Support Specialist (Hospitality & Partnerships)




Full-Time | Remote | Pacific Time




Overview

Our client, a fast-growing U.S.-based hospitality company, is looking for a Customer Support Specialist (Hospitality & Partnerships) to help deliver exceptional guest experiences while supporting inbound inquiries, partnership development, and private tour bookings across two growing travel brands.




This is not a traditional customer support role. You'll build relationships, guide clients through the booking process, manage partner accounts, and help drive business growth through consultative communication and outstanding service.




Key Responsibilities

Respond promptly to inbound inquiries from private and corporate clients.
Guide prospects through the booking process and prepare tailored proposals.
Build and maintain relationships with hotels, event planners, concierges, and referral partners.
Follow up with warm leads and convert inquiries into confirmed bookings.
Maintain accurate CRM records, pipeline updates, and client documentation.
Track sales activity and conversion metrics.
Collaborate with Marketing and Operations to ensure an outstanding customer experience.




Success in this Role

Build strong client relationships, grow strategic partnerships, and consistently convert inquiries into successful bookings.




Requirements

2+ years of experience in Customer Support, Client Relations, Hospitality, Tourism, Sales, or Account Coordination.
Excellent spoken and written English.
Experience using CRM platforms.
Strong Google Sheets and Google Docs skills.
Comfortable managing multiple priorities in a fast-paced remote environment.
Excellent organizational skills and attention to detail.
Strong communication, negotiation, and relationship-building skills.




What We're Looking For

Customer-first mindset.
Responsive and proactive.
Relationship-driven.
Organized and dependable.
Collaborative team player.




Nice to Have

Hospitality, tourism, events, or food & beverage experience.
Experience working with hotels, concierges, event planners, or corporate clients.
Canva experience.
Airtable, HubSpot, or Salesforce.
Familiarity with AI tools such as Claude.




Why Join

Join two fast-growing hospitality brands where you'll build meaningful relationships, create memorable experiences, and play a key role in the company's growth.

title: B2B Customer Success KAM
skills: Ownership - We own our successes & our failures as a team.
Excellence - We do everything to the best of our ability & always seek to achieve a new level of excellence in our work.
Inclusion - We believe we are stronger together and actively work to promote a safe, diverse, inclusive, and respectful culture.
Customer Obsession - We understand the value Klar can bring to its customers & it’s always at the forefront of our decisions.
Klarity - We communicate clearly & with authenticity. It’s in our name & it’s what we do.

Client Relationship Management: Build, manage, and strengthen relationships with brokers and strategic partners. Conduct regular in-person visits with brokers to strengthen relationships and uncover business opportunities.

Product Adoption & Monetization: Ensure clients adopt Klar’s products (credit lines, bank accounts, payments, etc.), actively use them, and realize their full value—translating into revenue growth for both clients and Klar.
Retention & Churn Prevention: Monitor account health and engagement signals, proactively addressing risks and executing retention playbooks to reduce churn.
Upsell & Cross-sell: Drive business growth by expanding and developing the assigned broker portfolio. Identify, prospect, and close new partnership opportunities.
Collaboration & Feedback: Work closely with Risk, Product, Operations, and Revenue teams to solve client issues quickly and provide structured feedback for product and process improvements.

Performance Management: Own clear KPIs such as portfolio growth, product usage, revenue per client, retention rates, and NPS. Analyze commercial performance, portfolio metrics, and market trends to identify growth opportunities and define action plans.
Bachelor’s degree in Business, Finance, Marketing, or related field (or equivalent experience).
2–5 years of experience in B2B sales, preferably in fintech, SaaS, or financial services.
Strong understanding of financial products and services (e.g., payments, lending, , KYC).
Proven track record of meeting or exceeding sales quotas.
Excellent communication, negotiation, and interpersonal skills.
Self-motivated, organized, and comfortable working in a fast-paced startup environment.
Experience with CRM software (e.g., Salesforce, HubSpot).
Competitive salary based on performance and experience
Chance of earning Klar stock options
15 days of paid vacation per year; plus extended maternity and paternity leaves
Vacation premium

Food vouchers
Medical Insurance
Computer device
Wellhub subscription to offer mental and physical health
Sponsored coaching and therapy sessions
A modern centrally located office in Mexico City with free drinks, snacks, and regular social events
