title: Creative Technologist
skills: Architect, evaluate, and refine AI-powered production workflows for creative adaptation and digital display.

Oversee the development and adaptation of HTML5 ads and creative materials, using tools such as GSAP and Google Web Designer. Ensure all assets are resized, optimised, and delivered on time to meet the needs of the campaign.
Manage the process of creating and optimising dynamic creative content for large-scale campaigns, using platforms like Flashtalking, Celtra, and Google Creative Studio.

Strategically map the production lifecycle from initial brief to final delivery, pinpointing opportunities to enhance operational velocity, consistency, and creative scalability through advanced automation, structured data inputs, and superior tooling.
Work closely with design, development, and media teams to ensure a seamless production process, providing clear guidance and feedback to ensure the highest quality outputs.
Ensure all deliverables meet high standards of quality and functionality.
Stay updated with industry trends, emerging technologies, and new platforms relevant to digital ad production and creative technology.
Manage the preparation and localization of assets, ensuring that creative assets are appropriately adapted for different markets and channels
5+ years of experience in digital production, creative technology, or similar roles, with a strong focus on digital ad development and optimization.

Demonstrable curiosity and applied knowledge of generative AI within creative ecosystems, specifically focusing on agentic methodologies, nodal architectures, and the deployment of automated, interconnected production tooling.
Solid understanding of DCO (Dynamic Creative Optimization), including working with dynamic feeds, creative updates, and tools like Google Creative Studio and Ads Creative Studio.
Proficiency in HTML5, CSS, and JavaScript, with experience in hand-coding interactive and animated display ads.
Strong skills in Adobe Suite (After Effects, Photoshop, Illustrator), Figma, and 3D software (Blender is a bonus).
Experience with AI-powered platforms
Excellent project management skills with experience balancing multiple projects and deadlines.
Advanced English
description:
About the job

At Jellyfish we believe that our individual differences are our greatest assets. We are passionate about empowering every employee to reach their full potential and contribute their unique perspectives to our collaborative environment. We are an equal opportunity employer and firmly believe that a diverse and inclusive workforce drives innovation and leads to better solutions. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, age, disability, veteran status, or any other personal characteristics that make them who they are.

Jellyfish is a global digital marketing agency; a unique fusion of tech enthusiasts, creative minds, and media and data experts all united to empower our clients along their digital journey. Our commitment to embracing diverse perspectives fuels our innovation and strategies that challenge the status quo, reinvent media activation, and craft influential stories for our global clients and their customers. Join us in shaping a future where business growth and personal fulfilment go hand in hand.

Job Description

We are seeking a systems-oriented creative production expert who excels at building and troubleshooting HTML5 display ads but is even more passionate about revolutionizing creative workflows.

In the role of Creative Technologist, you will spearhead the transformation of HTML5 display production by implementing AI-enhanced workflows and automated, scalable systems. Collaborating with creative, strategy, media, and development teams, you will convert campaign goals into efficient production frameworks. Your influence will span the entire lifecycle, defining how briefs, prompts, feeds, and variants integrate with rigorous QA and approval steps.

Responsibilities


Architect, evaluate, and refine AI-powered production workflows for creative adaptation and digital display.
Oversee the development and adaptation of HTML5 ads and creative materials, using tools such as GSAP and Google Web Designer. Ensure all assets are resized, optimised, and delivered on time to meet the needs of the campaign.
Manage the process of creating and optimising dynamic creative content for large-scale campaigns, using platforms like Flashtalking, Celtra, and Google Creative Studio.
Strategically map the production lifecycle from initial brief to final delivery, pinpointing opportunities to enhance operational velocity, consistency, and creative scalability through advanced automation, structured data inputs, and superior tooling.
Work closely with design, development, and media teams to ensure a seamless production process, providing clear guidance and feedback to ensure the highest quality outputs.
Ensure all deliverables meet high standards of quality and functionality.
Stay updated with industry trends, emerging technologies, and new platforms relevant to digital ad production and creative technology.
Manage the preparation and localization of assets, ensuring that creative assets are appropriately adapted for different markets and channels


Qualifications


5+ years of experience in digital production, creative technology, or similar roles, with a strong focus on digital ad development and optimization.
Demonstrable curiosity and applied knowledge of generative AI within creative ecosystems, specifically focusing on agentic methodologies, nodal architectures, and the deployment of automated, interconnected production tooling.
Solid understanding of DCO (Dynamic Creative Optimization), including working with dynamic feeds, creative updates, and tools like Google Creative Studio and Ads Creative Studio.
Proficiency in HTML5, CSS, and JavaScript, with experience in hand-coding interactive and animated display ads.
Strong skills in Adobe Suite (After Effects, Photoshop, Illustrator), Figma, and 3D software (Blender is a bonus).
Experience with AI-powered platforms
Excellent project management skills with experience balancing multiple projects and deadlines.
Advanced English


Note: We emphasise skills, expertise and behavioural attributes over years of experience and traditional degrees. If you want to join our collaborative team, we invite you to apply today with your resume in English.

Additional Information

Join Jellyfish and experience a workplace where we prioritise your growth, celebrate your contributions, and empower you to tailor your work environment to suit your needs.

💰 Savings fund: You'll save 5% of your monthly income and Jellyfish will contribute the same amount you save to your savings fund.

💫 Custom Work Environment: Work remotely for up to 60% of your days and shape your day between 8am. and 6:30pm with flexible working hours.

🏥 Health Insurance: We provide a private health insurance policy that includes visual and dental plan coverage.

Unfortunately, there has been an increase in fake recruiters impersonating Jellyfish and unlawfully using our brand name. If you are unsure if an email with a job offer you have received is genuinely from Jellyfish, or if you suspect any fraudulent activity, please report it to talentacquisition@jellyfish.com.

This role will be responsible for developing strong marketing relationships with key Connectivity & Networking customers, for developing innovative co-marketing communication, propelling key technology narratives, and executing win/win co-marketing programs with customers.

description:
About the job

Position

Marketing Intelligence Analyst

Job Description

Arrow Electronics is a global provider of products, services, and solutions to industrial and commercial users of electronic components and enterprise computing solutions. Arrow Electronics guides innovation forward for over 220,000 leading technology manufacturers and service providers. With 2025 sales of $30.9 billion, Arrow develops technology solutions that improve business and daily life. The company maintains 228 locations worldwide with over 85 countries served.

Arrow Electronics is seeking a highly skilled and motivated Digital Market Intelligence Analyst to join our Global Components Digital Analytics team. This is a key opportunity to help shape a data driven culture and drive insights that influence global strategy.

What You Will Do

In this role, you will build data products, troubleshoot tracking issues, and conduct deep dive analyses that unlock actionable insights for the business. Responsibilities include:


Utilizing data analytics and visualization tools to provide statistical insight for the business – these tools include but are not limited to Adobe Customer Journey Analytics, Azure Databricks, SQL, and Power BI
Owning key business datasets and providing recommendations for action
Identifying tracking gaps and partnering with developers and business teams to resolve them
Discovering opportunities to enhance data collection and instrumentation
Integrating external data sources to enrich digital analytics
Delivering recurring reports and supporting ad hoc analysis needs. Be able to turn around projects in a tight timeline.
Leading end-to-end analytical projects with long-term impact
Staying current with emerging digital analytics tools and methodologies, and advocating for continuous improvement


What We’re Looking For (Requirement)


Bachelor’s degree and 5+ years of analytics experience. 
Strong proficiency in web analytics, such Adobe Customer Journey Analytics
Background in A/B testing, marketing analytics, or customer behavior analysis
Strong analytical skills with the ability to identify trends and drive recommendations
Demonstrated experience working cross functionally with business and technical teams
Excellent communication skills with the ability to simplify complex concepts
Ability to thrive in a fast-paced environment with a high degree of accountability


Nice To Have (Preferred But Not Required)


Strong proficiency in SQL, Azure Databricks, and Power BI
Working knowledge of B2B lead management, Salesforce, and marketing automation platforms (Marketo or Eloqua)
Experience in large global companies


About The Team

Global Components Digital Analytics empowers business decisions by connecting fragmented data to reveal the customer journey across digital and business platforms, delivering actionable insights that deepen understanding and optimize engagement, acquisition, and growth.

Our vision is to be a trusted strategic partner and advisor of insight and innovation, enabling a data-driven culture that transforms how we work, plan, and grow.

What's In It For You

At Arrow, we recognize that financial rewards and great benefits are important aspects of an ideal job. That’s why we offer competitive financial compensation, including various compensation plans, and a solid benefits package.


30 days of Christmas bonus
40% vacation premium
12 vacation days plus 2 floating days
Vision and Dental Assistance
Life Insurance
Healthcare Insurance
10% Food/Pantry Vouchers
Restaurant Vouchers
13% Savings Fund
Access to Arrow’s Employee Discount Program
Growth Opportunities, and more!

$41,041.67 - $49,500.00 MXN Monthly

description:
About the job

Charly Agency is looking for a senior, client-facing web strategist and project manager who can move website and landing page projects fast, cleanly, and without chaos. This is not a beginner role, and it is not a pure design or development role. We want someone who can lead client relationships, coordinate clients, designers, developers, copywriters, and SEO specialists, then turn all of that input into high-quality website and landing page deliverables.




This is a holistic role that touches copy, design, and technology. The heavier focus is on copy and design tied to a your ability to underatnd a business and its marketing strategy, where good taste is essential. On the technology side, you have developers to lean on, so deep technical expertise is not required. What we want there is thoughtful oversight, the kind any sharp user would bring, to make sure quality standards are met.




We are looking for someone sharp, organized, direct, and reliable. Above all, someone responsible. No babysitting, no vague communication, no hiding behind "I was waiting for feedback." You should be eager to learn, open to direction, and quick on feedback. Mistakes happen, but high quality, great communication skills, proactivity and honesty are critical for this role.




A service and hospitality mindset is essential. You will be the face of Charly to our clients, and how you show up in every interaction matters as much as the work itself.




You should be comfortable with:




Leading client communications and managing expectations throughout the project lifecycle
Managing website and landing page projects from brief to launch
Reviewing Figma, Webflow, Shopify, WordPress, or Framer work
Consolidating feedback from multiple stakeholders
Improving landing pages for ads, organic traffic, B2B, B2C, and e-commerce
Keeping quality high under tight deadlines
Communicating directly with clients in FLUENT ENGLISH when needed
Managing scope, priorities, and project budgets




Ideal background:




Approximately 10 years of experience in web design, web development, CRO, UX/UI, digital project management, or website strategy
Strong creative and marketing skill set: you understand what makes a website work commercially, not just technically
Perfect, near-native English (this is non-negotiable for a client-facing role)
Strong understanding of marketing websites and conversion-focused pages
Comfortable working in PST/PDT timezone
Agency experience is a strong plus




About us:




Charly is a creative agency with a warm, international team that takes the work seriously without taking ourselves too seriously. We collaborate across time zones, support each other, and care a lot about doing great work for clients we genuinely like. If you are kind, talented, and ambitious, you will fit right in.

Coordinar equipos internos, agencias externas y stakeholders clave, facilitando la alineación y toma de decisiones estratégicas.
Supervisar y desarrollar un equipo de tres personas, fomentando alto desempeño, accountability y mejora continua.
Identificar oportunidades de innovación en canales, herramientas y estrategias, incorporando mejores prácticas de mercado en marketing, customer experience y analítica.
Licenciatura en Mercadotecnia, Publicidad, Comunicación o carrera afín, con especialidad en Marketing Digital.
Más de 7 años de experiencia en marketing, con al menos 3 años liderando equipos.
Experiencia comprobable en gestión de proyectos complejos y marketing de servicios en entornos multicanal.
Dominio de herramientas de analítica, CRM y plataformas de marketing digital.
Inglés avanzado para interactuar con equipos globales y liderar conversaciones de negocio.

Deseable: certificaciones en customer experience, data analytics o transformación digital.
Salario competitivo acorde a tu experiencia y trayectoria profesional, con oportunidades reales de crecimiento dentro de una empresa global.
Diversidad de proyectos que combinan estrategia, innovación digital y liderazgo, manteniendo tu día a día estimulante y retador.
Un ambiente de trabajo colaborativo y cercano, donde la diversidad de perspectivas impulsa mejores resultados.
Flexibilidad y equilibrio entre vida personal y profesional gracias a nuestro esquema híbrido.

Participación directa en la transición energética, generando impacto positivo en la sociedad.
description:
About the job

Líder Marketing B2C

En ENGIE, impulsamos la transición energética con soluciones que transforman la vida de millones de personas. Buscamos a quien lidere nuestra estrategia de marketing B2C, conectando a más clientes con energía limpia y servicios innovadores. Tu visión estratégica y capacidad de ejecución serán clave para acelerar nuestro crecimiento.

Si te apasiona combinar creatividad, datos y liderazgo para generar impacto real en el negocio, este rol es para ti. Aquí encontrarás un entorno donde tus ideas se convierten en resultados tangibles.

Tus responsabilidades


 Definir y ejecutar el plan anual de marketing B2C alineado con los objetivos comerciales de ENGIE México, maximizando la captación y fidelización de clientes.
 Diseñar campañas de adquisición y crecimiento de cartera gestionando canales digitales como SEO, SEM, redes sociales y email marketing para optimizar conversión y ROI.
 Liderar la estrategia de comunicación hacia clientes actuales y potenciales, asegurando una narrativa consistente con la propuesta de valor de ENGIE.
 Gestionar el portafolio de proyectos de marketing con metodologías ágiles (Scrum), garantizando cumplimiento de tiempos, alcance y presupuesto.
 Coordinar equipos internos, agencias externas y stakeholders clave, facilitando la alineación y toma de decisiones estratégicas.
 Supervisar y desarrollar un equipo de tres personas, fomentando alto desempeño, accountability y mejora continua.
 Identificar oportunidades de innovación en canales, herramientas y estrategias, incorporando mejores prácticas de mercado en marketing, customer experience y analítica.


Tu perfil


 Licenciatura en Mercadotecnia, Publicidad, Comunicación o carrera afín, con especialidad en Marketing Digital.
 Más de 7 años de experiencia en marketing, con al menos 3 años liderando equipos.
 Experiencia comprobable en gestión de proyectos complejos y marketing de servicios en entornos multicanal.
 Dominio de herramientas de analítica, CRM y plataformas de marketing digital.
 Inglés avanzado para interactuar con equipos globales y liderar conversaciones de negocio.
 Comunicación estratégica sobresaliente con capacidad para influir en stakeholders y alinear equipos multidisciplinarios.
 Deseable: certificaciones en customer experience, data analytics o transformación digital.


Ubicación

Oficina Central, ENGIE México. Modalidad híbrida de trabajo.

Lo que ofrecemos


 Salario competitivo acorde a tu experiencia y trayectoria profesional, con oportunidades reales de crecimiento dentro de una empresa global.
 Diversidad de proyectos que combinan estrategia, innovación digital y liderazgo, manteniendo tu día a día estimulante y retador.
 Un ambiente de trabajo colaborativo y cercano, donde la diversidad de perspectivas impulsa mejores resultados.
 Flexibilidad y equilibrio entre vida personal y profesional gracias a nuestro esquema híbrido.
 Desarrollo profesional continuo con acceso a formación, certificaciones y exposición a equipos internacionales.
 Participación directa en la transición energética, generando impacto positivo en la sociedad.


Nuestro compromiso

En ENGIE, cada talento tiene un papel fundamental en la aceleración de la transición energética. Marca la diferencia y disfruta de una experiencia profesional enriquecedora. Asume retos apasionantes y construye una trayectoria que refleje quién eres. Únete y sé parte de la aventura del siglo.

ENGIE es una empresa comprometida con la igualdad de oportunidades. Valoramos la diversidad en todas sus formas y no discriminamos por género, origen étnico, orientación sexual, discapacidad, edad, religión ni ninguna otra condición. Todas las personas cualificadas son bienvenidas a postularse.

Si necesitas algún ajuste razonable durante el proceso de selección, no dudes en comunicarlo. Estamos aquí para garantizar que tu experiencia sea accesible e inclusiva.

Unidad de negocio: GBU Networks

División: Gas Networks Americas - Mexico

Entidad legal: ENGIE MEX CONSULTORES, S.A. DE C.V.

Entidad legal: ENGIE Mexico
